Container.Name: stash-filemonitor
Container.Overview: Runs the upstream Stash FileMonitor plugin in a Python sidecar container. This template/image is only an Unraid-friendly wrapper; it is not the FileMonitor plugin itself. The FileMonitor plugin is created and maintained upstream at https://github.com/David-Maisonave/Axter-Stash.
Container.Requires: Build the local image first with: docker build -t stash-filemonitor:local /mnt/user/appdata/stash-filemonitor-docker

Config.Name: Media Path
Config.Description: Media path to watch. The container target should match the path Stash uses in library settings.

Config.Name: Stash URL
Config.Description: Base URL for Stash. Do not include /graphql.

Config.Name: Stash API Key
Config.Description: Stash API key, required when Stash auth is enabled.

Config.Name: Docker Mapping Config
Config.Description: Optional path to a mounted docker-compose.yml or mapping file for FileMonitor --docker path translation.
